{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Kareia
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Kareia]] is the most abundant of the [[United Worlds]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36">''Waybound'', chapter 36</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Kareia]] is a location with clouds.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Nations and empires]]
